query:
CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS `deal_screener_payments` (
  `id` int NOT NULL AUTO_INCREMENT,
  `userId` int NOT NULL,
  `stripeSessionId` varchar(255) NOT NULL,
  `stripePaymentIntentId` varchar(255) DEFAULT NULL,
  `status` varchar(20) NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',
  `dealId` varchar(64) DEFAULT NULL,
  `amountUsd` decimal(8,2) NOT NULL DEFAULT '32.50',
  `createdAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  `updatedAt` timestamp NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP ON UPDATE CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,
  PRIMARY KEY (`id`),
  UNIQUE KEY `dsp_session_unique` (`stripeSessionId`),
  KEY `dsp_user_idx` (`userId`),
  KEY `dsp_status_idx` (`status`),
  CONSTRAINT `dsp_user_fk` FOREIGN KEY (`userId`) REFERENCES `users` (`id`) ON DELETE CASCADE
);
